//: Vugg Simulator TypeScript config — script-style compilation.
//1: Each js/*.ts file is treated as a SCRIPT (no import/export); its top-level
//2: declarations become globals when concatenated by tools/build.mjs. This
//3: matches the existing structure of the inline <script> in index.html and
//4: lets us migrate the bundle one file at a time without rewriting call sites.
//6: Strictness starts loose because the seed code was written without TS in mind.
